query: This workflow uses Gemini to process and split prompts. I'd like to compare Gemini to Claude for generating complex, multi-part image prompts. What are the trade-offs in terms of output quality, prompt structure, rate limits, and cost? Just research, don't modify the workflow.

_tags.author_rationale: This query asks for a concrete comparison of Gemini vs Claude, relevant to the text-processing workflow, requiring targeted research rather than bland 'improve it'.
